visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged man in a red sweater and a plaid flat cap speaking directly to the camera against a grey-ribbed wall. He gestures frequently with his hands while clear text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear below him. (2) As the narration continues, inset clips appear: one from 'Inside Edition' showing a woman's face before and after a digital beauty filter, and another showing a young girl applying a rabbit-ear filter. The main character continues speaking in a circular inset at the bottom right. (3) The scene transitions to a screen recording of the TikTok app interface, showing various beauty filters being scrolled through. A cute dog emoji appears temporarily over the main speaker's face in the inset circle. (4) The final segment returns to the full-screen view of the man in the studio, where he summarizes the information and poses a question to his audience to encourage comments and engagement.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @ 3ctim. [Subtitle]: TikTok針對18歲以下的. (2) [Subtitle]: 青少年築出新規定!. (3) [Subtitle]: 由於現在各種美顏濾鏡盛行. (4) [Subtitle]: 造成了許多青少年對於自己的外表感到焦慮. (5) [Subtitle]: 因此TikTok已經宣布針對18歲以下用戶. (6) [Subtitle]: 禁止使用人工放大眼睛啊豐唇、平滑的皮膚或者是改變膚色的濾鏡工具. (7) [Subtitle]: 只保留兔子耳朵、狗鼻子這種類似漫畫的一個濾鏡. (8) [Subtitle]: 另外加強了年齡管理. (9) [Subtitle]: 預計13歲以下的孩童使用TikTok會有一個新的自動化的系統來偵測. (10) [Subtitle]: 違反年齡限制的人, 誒, 你就小心了. (11) [Subtitle]: 對於這樣規範你認同嗎?. (12) [Subtitle]: 留言告訴我你的想法.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator in studio, 1 woman and 1 girl appearing in supporting video clips.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a red long-sleeved sweater, a brown and white plaid flat cap, and glasses. He has several bracelets on his right wrist and a dark smartwatch on his left.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a minimalist studio with grey vertically-ribbed wall panels. Inset clips show a television studio with bright lights and a domestic indoor setting with warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a clear, professional male voice in Traditional Chinese. Background music consists of a bright, mid-tempo acoustic guitar melody with a subtle drum beat. The acoustic environment is very clean, indicating a studio recording. (2) A high-pitched 'ding' sound effect triggers as a new text graphic appears. The narrator's pitch is stable, and his delivery is fluent and well-enunciated. The BGM remains at a consistent low volume underneath the speech. (3) A subtle 'pop' sound effect coincides with a visual emoji appearing on the screen. The speaker continues explaining the policy details with a calm and informative tone, maintaining a moderate speech rate without significant pauses. (4) The speaker's intonation rises slightly at the end while asking for audience opinions. The acoustic guitar BGM continues until the very end of the clip, providing a cohesive and friendly atmosphere to the news report.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about TikTok's new policy banning body-altering beauty filters for users under 18. The video explains the psychological rationale behind the ban and outlines new automated age-detection systems for younger children.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A concise and professional tech-news update formatted specifically for short-form social media platforms.
